arts.ttl: Agent throws a strop and now considering agreeing big move to Manchester United
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies’ agent Nick Househ has been left angry by Bayern Munich’s attitude during contract negotiations, so now wants to listen to offers from Manchester United and Real Madrid. That’s according to journalist Christian Falk, who says Manchester United may not be as far out of the picture for Davies as it appeared.
